MINUTES
(404/MAS) JOSEPH CARIGNAN WITH PET. CHRISTINE TOUR-SARKISSIAN WITH RESP. COUNSEL MET IN CHAMBER CONFERENCE PRIOR TO GOING ON THE RECORD. PARTIES SWORN AND TESTIFIED. P
ET VOIR DIRED AS TO JURISDICTIONAL FACTS WHICH ARE PLACED ON THE RECORD. COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TO GRANT BIFURCATION AND STATUS ONLY JUDGMENT
FROM TIME PET STARTS EMPLOYMENT SO LONG AS RESP FILES MOTION WITHIN 30 DAYS OF DISCOVERY OF SAID EMPLOYMENT. PET TO NOTIFY RESP RE: CHANGES IN
/MN OVER AND ABOVE CURRENT C/S UNTIL AMOUNT IS PAID IN FULL. COURT ORDERS PET TO REIMBURSE ONE-HALF OF CHILD CARE COSTS WITHIN 10 DAYS OF RECEIVING
SHE IS MOVING OUT OF FAMILY RESIDENCE AND SHE WILL PROVIDE NEW RESIDENCE INFORMATION TO RESP BY NO LATER THAN 7/11/01. PARTIES AGREE TO WORK OUT
AM FOR 2 HOUR S/C TO REVIEW FOLLOWING: PET'S EMPLOYMENT STATUS, C/V SCHEDULE AND DISCOVERY ISSUE. PET TO PREPARE ORDER. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY MARY
ELLEN SCHERER #5208 REVIEW FOLLOWING: PET'S EMPLOYMENT STATUS, C/V SCHEDULE AND DISCOVERY ISSUE. PET TO PREPARE ORDER. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY MARY
